children.heading: Consultation on problems relating to employment
children.label: a Consultation on problems relating to employment
children.text: The Secretary may consult with any persons, including representatives of labor, management, agriculture, and government, who can assist in addressing the problems of area and regional unemployment or underemployment.

children.heading: Consultation on administration of chapter
children.label: b Consultation on administration of chapter
children.text: The Secretary may provide for such consultation with interested Federal agencies as the Secretary determines to be appropriate in the performance of the duties of the Secretary under this chapter.
